title: Tharala Tar Mag
subTitle: Sayali, an orphan, is an optimistic girl who approaches Arjun, a lawyer, to take up her foster father, Madhubhau's case. Later, the lawyer asks for an unusual favour from her.

title: Tuhi Re Mazha Mitwa
subTitle: Arnav, a not-so-happy businessman, has a traumatic past. However, when he crosses paths with Ishwari, a carefree girl, his life changes.

title: Nasheebwan
subTitle: Young, vibrant Girija encounters the wicked Nageshwar Ghorpade, oblivious to their tragic connection. Love and destiny intertwine as karma unfolds in this household.

title: Saadhi Manasa
subTitle: Fate brings together an ambitious woman and a carefree man in the union of marriage. However, they face several challenges before feelings blossom between them.

title: Lapandav
subTitle: Sakhi, a young rebellious girl, who is known to lock horns with her manipulative mother, finds her life changing after she meets with Kanha.

title: Vachan Dile Tu Mala
subTitle: Young lawyer Urjaa Shinde emerges as a champion for the common people. Soon, her pursuit of justice pits her against the powerful Harshwardhan, leading to turmoil.

title: Lagnanantar Hoilach Prem
subTitle: Nandini and Parth are set to marry, but a tragedy on their wedding day alters their future, forcing them to confront unexpected challenges as they navigate a new, uncertain life together.

title: Morambaa
subTitle: Reva and Rama are best friends who share an unbreakable bond. However, they find themselves in a trivial place when they fall in love with the same man.

title: Nasheebwan
subTitle: Young, vibrant Girija encounters the wicked Nageshwar Ghorpade, oblivious to their tragic connection. Love and destiny intertwine as karma unfolds in this household.

title: Tujhya Sobatine
subTitle: Malhar interrupts Nupur's engagement to offer her a permanent role at his company. Later, she cancels her impending marriage to Chavre in favour of the professional opportunity.

subTitle: Fate brings together an ambitious woman and a carefree man in the union of marriage. However, they face several challenges before feelings blossom between them.

subTitle: A tough woman, who is ready to fight alone due to the dearth of affinity, is only scared of the shackles of marriage. However, she gets irritated when a local hoodlum tries to romance her.
